turns.content: Help me plan my week. I have a dentist appointment Tuesday, need to finish the API redesign by Thursday, and want to prep for the team retrospective on Friday.

📋 SUMMARY: Weekly planning for Feb 11-15, 2026.

Here's a structured plan for your week, Jm:

**Monday (Today - Feb 11)**
1. Finalize weekly priorities and block focus time
2. Start API redesign work — identify remaining tasks and scope
3. Review retro topics to start collecting notes passively

**Tuesday (Feb 12)**
- Dentist appointment — block travel + recovery time around it
- Continue API redesign in remaining focus blocks
- Light work day around the appointment

**Wednesday (Feb 13)**
1. Deep focus day on API redesign — this is your critical push day
2. Aim to have core implementation complete by EOD
3. Start drafting retro prep notes (what went well, what didn't, action items)

**Thursday (Feb 14)**
1. Finish and validate API redesign — testing, docs, PR
2. Buffer time for any redesign overflow
3. Finalize retro prep materials

**Friday (Feb 15)**
1. Team retrospective
2. Wrap up any loose ends from the week
3. Weekly review

**From your goals context — worth weaving in:**
- S3/S4 (Community Events & Social Invitations) are critical — consider scheduling 1-2 social touchpoints this week
- S6 (Morning Stretch) is at 0% — even 5 minutes each morning compounds
- S1 (Pomodoro) — use for the API redesign deep work blocks

Want me to block any of this on your calendar, or break down the API redesign into subtasks?

🗣️ Kaya: Week planned around dentist Tuesday, API deadline Thursday, retro Friday. Three focus days mapped.
